audit_items.proof_trace: All free sites in dict.c follow safe patterns: _dictClear saves nextHe before zfree(he) and nulls ht->table via _dictReset; dictRehash overwrites freed table pointer immediately via struct copy; dictRelease frees d only after both tables are cleared. The one edge case — dictGenericDelete returning a freed pointer at L391 — is only used for a null-check by dictDelete (never dereferenced), and the freed entry is already unlinked from the chain before free, precluding double-free. No freed pointer is ever dereferenced within dict.c.
